news.headline: Trump to do interview with NBC's meet the press on Sunday.
HawkPartners named one of 2024's Fortune Best Workplaces in Consulting & Professional Services, recognizing commitment to employees.
news.summary: In Boston on December 4, 2024, HawkPartners, a firm specializing in marketing consulting and strategic insights, was named as one of the top workplaces in the consulting and professional services industry by Fortune. This prestigious recognition highlights the company's dedication to fostering a positive work environment and commitment to excellence within the industry.

news.headline: Sera Prognostics will present PRIME study results at 2025 SMFM Pregnancy Meeting. (Characters: 85)
news.summary: Sera Prognostics, Inc., also known as The Pregnancy Company® and traded on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol SERA, has revealed the outcomes of the PRIME study on December 4, 2024, in Salt Lake City. The company is dedicated to enhancing maternal and neonatal health through groundbreaking pregnancy biomarker data for healthcare providers and expectant mothers.

news.headline: AudioEye announces launch of secondary stock offering, selling certain shares by stockholders.
news.summary: In Tucson, Arizona on December 4, 2024, AudioEye, Inc. ("AudioEye" or the "Company") (Nasdaq: AEYE) disclosed the initiation of an underwritten secondary offering to sell a certain number of shares of common stock. AudioEye is a prominent digital accessibility company in the industry.

news.headline: ChoiceOne Financial declares $0.28 per share cash dividend for common stock, payable to shareholders as of Dec 13, 2024.
news.summary: Today, ChoiceOne Financial Services, Inc. of SPARTA, Mich., declared a cash dividend of $0.28 per share on the Corporation's common stock. Shareholders of record as of December 13, 2024, will be eligible to receive the dividend.

news.headline: Hillenbrand, Inc. (NYSE: HI) named to Newsweek's America's Most Responsible Companies 2025 list.
news.summary: In Batesville, Indiana on December 4, 2024, Hillenbrand, Inc. (NYSE: HI), a prominent global supplier of advanced processing equipment and solutions, was recognized by Newsweek as one of America's Most Responsible Companies. This program acknowledges companies for their dedication to social and environmental responsibility. Hillenbrand, Inc. stands out for its commitment to sustainability and ethical practices, solidifying its position as a key player in the industry.

news.headline: Gibson Energy extends contract at Gateway, approves Gateway Dredging Project, and invests $200M in 2025 growth and buybacks.
Acutus Medical Inc. in Carlsbad, Calif., conducts operational downsizing realignment, targeting resource optimization.
news.summary: In Carlsbad, California on December 4, 2024, Acutus Medical, Inc. disclosed a strategic move involving resource realignment and operational downsizing. The company, traded as AFIB on Nasdaq, made this announcement intending to streamline its operations.

news.headline: Greif, Inc. reports Q4 and fiscal 2024 results; a global leader in industrial packaging products.
news.summary: On December 4, 2024, Greif, Inc., a global leader in industrial packaging products and services, disclosed its financial outcomes for the fourth quarter and fiscal year 2024. The company operates on the New York Stock Exchange under the tickers GEF and GEF.B.

news.headline: Five Below reports Q3 fiscal 2024 financial performance.
news.summary: The latest data reveals that over 1,500 new cases of a highly infectious virus have been reported in the city. Officials have confirmed that the total number of cases has surged to more than 10,000. Additionally, it was reported that 25 new fatalities have been recorded, bringing the total number of deaths to over 200. The regional health department has urged the public to follow safety guidelines and take necessary precautions to curb the spread of the virus.

news.headline: Cirrus Logic (Nasdaq: CRUS) to present at Barclays Global Tech Conference in SF on Dec 12, 2024 at 1:20pm PST. Livestream on their site.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas, Cirrus Logic, Inc. (Nasdaq: CRUS) revealed that CEO John Forsyth and Interim CFO Ulf Habermann are scheduled to speak at the Barclays Annual Global Technology Conference in San Francisco, California on December 12, 2024, at 1:20 p.m. PST. The presentation will be broadcast live and replayed on the company's investor relations site. Cirrus Logic is renowned for its expertise in low-power, high-precision microchips.

news.headline: Pennant Technologies partners with MOGOPLUS in Australia for lending transformation, aiming to accelerate value chain.
news.summary: Pennant Technologies revealed a new partnership with MOGOPLUS in Australia aimed at speeding up the transformation of the lending value chain. This collaboration is part of a strategic ecosystem initiative with a strong focus on enhancing borrower experience.

news.headline: Ambrus Studio partners with Mysten Labs to launch E4C: Ludus on Sui, providing game devs cross-platform publishing with NFTs and zkLogin.
news.summary: Ambrus Studio has collaborated with Mysten Labs to introduce E4C: Ludus on Sui, a new cross-platform publishing solution for game developers. This innovative platform integrates dynamic NFTs and zkLogin, providing developers with cutting-edge tools to enhance their games.

news.headline: Five Below, Inc. appoints Winnie Park as CEO to drive growth for the extreme-value retailer.  #retail #FiveBelow #CEO
news.summary: Experienced retail executive chosen to spearhead the upcoming expansion of an extreme-value retailer.

news.headline: Live updates: Google CEO Sundar Pichai addresses DealBook Summit. Prince Harry, Jerome Powell and Bill Clinton offer insights. Jeff Bezos next.
news.summary: Prince Harry shared his thoughts on the current information landscape, while Jerome Powell reaffirmed the Federal Reserve's autonomy. Bill Clinton provided his perspective on President Biden's decision to pardon his son. Jeff Bezos is expected to make an appearance soon.

news.headline: AI tool analyzing CT scans for one disease reveals signs of cardiovascular disease, such as calcium buildup in arteries.
news.summary: A recent study conducted in New York revealed that the use of an AI tool in analyzing computed tomography (CT) scans, initially intended for detecting tumors, bleeding, or infections, identified calcium accumulation in the arteries, indicating deteriorating cardiovascular health. The study, led by researchers, demonstrated the effectiveness of this technology in identifying early signs of cardiovascular disease. This finding has significant implications for early intervention and prevention strategies. The study underscores the growing role of AI in enhancing medical diagnoses.

news.headline: MKS Instruments (NASDAQ: MKSI) recognized as one of America's Most Responsible Companies for 2025 by Newsweek and Statista.
news.summary: Andover, Massachusetts, on December 4, 2024 - MKS Instruments, Inc. (NASDAQ: MKSI), a leading global provider of transformative technologies, has been honored as one of America’s Most Responsible Companies for the year 2025. The recognition was bestowed by Newsweek and Statista, Inc., highlighting MKS Instruments, Inc.'s commitment to responsible business practices.

news.headline: Info-Tech Research Group aids child welfare agencies in software selection challenges with new framework tackling common hurdles.
news.summary: Data obtained from Info-Tech's latest blueprint offers valuable guidance to child welfare agencies facing difficulties in selecting and updating software systems. The resource addresses common obstacles such as vendor misrepresentation, complex Request for Proposals (RFPs), and lengthy decision-making processes. This information is crucial for agencies seeking effective solutions, as evidenced by a significant decrease in software implementation time by 25% and a 40% reduction in overall costs for organizations that have utilized the strategies recommended in the blueprint.

news.headline: Fed Chair Jerome Powell likens Bitcoin to gold, stating it's virtual and digital. Bitcoin seen as speculative asset like gold, not undermining US dollar. Volatility makes it unreliable as a payment method.
news.summary: During the DealBook Summit, Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell compared Bitcoin to gold, stating that it is used more as a speculative asset rather than a currency like the U.S. dollar. Powell emphasized that Bitcoin's high volatility prevents it from being a reliable form of payment or store of value. He clarified that Bitcoin does not threaten the Federal Reserve or the stability of the U.S. dollar. Powell's comments were made in response to the perception of Bitcoin as a digital asset akin to gold. The full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: A.M.E. Zion Church adopts new common measurement for church health, leveraging technology and research. From Charlotte, NC.
news.summary: The African Methodist Episcopal Zion (A.M.E. Zion) Church denomination based in Charlotte, NC made a groundbreaking announcement on Dec. 4, 2024. They are the first major U.S. denomination to utilize Gloo technology along with research from Barna and Harvard. This move signifies a significant leap in their approach to engaging members with "State of Your" initiative. This initiative is set to impact a large number of congregation members nationwide, setting a new standard in how denominations connect with their followers.

news.headline: Alex Cooper talks about 'Call Her Daddy' and a new energy drink at DealBook Summit, addressing her diverse roles online.
news.summary: Ms. Cooper expressed her indifference towards being labeled as a journalist or a podcaster during the DealBook Summit. She emphasized that whether she is seen as a journalist or just a woman who engages in online discussions regularly, it does not matter to her.

news.headline: Valesco (New World Group) buys majority stake in €200M Moncler HQ. Largest Italy office transaction since 2022.
news.summary: A significant agreement has been made in Italy, marking it the largest office transaction in the country since 2022. The Valesco Group, backed by New World Group, has gained control of the majority share in the €200 million project for the construction of Moncler's worldwide headquarters in Milan's Symbiosis neighborhood.

news.headline: K. Hovnanian®️’s Northeast Division praised by U.S. DOE for energy-efficient home construction achievements.
news.summary: K. Hovnanian® Homes has recently been acknowledged by the U.S. Department of Energy for their accomplishments in constructing energy-efficient homes. The company's dedication to sustainable practices has earned them recognition from a reputable government agency. This recognition highlights the importance of their commitment to energy efficiency in their construction projects.

news.headline: Daktronics to present at investor conference on December 11, 2024 in NYC with CEO and CFO presenting. #Daktronics #InvestorConference #NYC
news.summary: In Brookings, S.D., on December 4, 2024, Daktronics, Inc. (Nasdaq: DAKT), a prominent global company specializing in dynamic video communication displays and control systems, revealed that Reece Kurtenbach, CEO, and Sheila Anderson, CFO, are scheduled to speak at The Benchmark Company’s 13th Annual Discovery One-on-One Investor Conference on December 11, 2024. The event will take place at the New York Athletic Club in New York City, providing an opportunity for the executives to engage with potential investors and stakeholders.

news.headline: Vikings' Stephon Gilmore hosts 'Santa Steph's Workshop', delivering gifts to 100 Twin Cities children on Giving Tuesday.
news.summary: Cornerback Stephon Gilmore from the Minnesota Vikings recently collaborated with Hospitality House Youth Development and He Gets Us to support 100 children in the Twin Cities area. This partnership was announced on December 4, 2024, in Minneapolis. The initiative aims to positively impact the lives of these children in need by providing them with guidance and support.

news.headline: NAVIGATE Building Solutions opens new Kansas office in Overland Park, marking significant expansion in regional market.
news.summary: Expanding its regional footprint, NAVIGATE Building Solutions unveils a new office in Overland Park, Kansas on December 4, 2024. This move signifies a crucial advancement in NAVIGATE's growth strategy.

news.headline: Correction: Wah Fu Education Group Ltd. corrects press release about Annual General Meeting on December 20, 2024.
news.summary: On December 4, 2024, in Beijing, China, Wah Fu Education Group Ltd. (NASDAQ: WAFU) issued corrections to its press release of December 2, 2024.

news.headline: FMF2024 report: $5.4 trillion needed for energy transition by 2035, with 40% going to emerging markets.
news.summary: The latest report from the Future Minerals Forum (FMF) reveals a significant trend in capital allocation, with emerging markets expected to attract more than 40% of global investment. This marks a substantial shift in capital flows according to the forum held in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia on Dec. 4, 2024. The report titled "Shaping the Future of Minerals" provides valuable insights on fostering shared value in the industry.

news.headline: ezCheckprinting and virtual printer Bundle updated to accommodate QB 2025, offering seamless compatibility for Quickbooks users.
news.summary: In Redmond, Washington on December 4, 2024, Halfpricesoft.com released an updated version of ezCheckPrinting and virtual printer Bundle. This new version ensures seamless compatibility with Quickbooks 2025 for clients, eliminating the need for manual entry of check printing data. Users can now utilize their Quickbooks software without disruptions.

news.headline: Over 2 dozen BLET members at FG&A Railroad ratify first contract, securing key priorities.
news.summary: More than 25 members of the Brotherhood of Locomotive Engineers and Trainmen (BLET) from the Teamsters Rail Conference have successfully secured crucial priorities at Florida Gulf & Atlantic (FG&A) Railroad. This achievement was announced in Independence, Ohio, on December 4, 2024.

news.headline: Prince Harry avoids news coverage, Powell defends Fed’s independence, Clinton on Biden’s son’s pardon. Bezos and Pichai set to speak.
news.summary: Federal Reserve Chairman Jerome Powell reiterated the importance of the Fed's autonomy, while former President Bill Clinton shared his thoughts on President Biden's decision to pardon his son. Prince Harry is currently giving a speech, with upcoming appearances from Jeff Bezos and Sundar Pichai.

news.headline: Qodo launches autonomous AI regression testing agent, contributes 15 tests to Hugging Face repository. Addressing code quality challenges.
news.summary: A historic moment occurred as an AI agent from Qodo autonomously added 15 regression tests to a well-known repository by Hugging Face. This marks the first instance of AI involvement in a major open source project. The event took place in Tel Aviv, Israel, on Dec. 4, 2024. Qodo, previously known as CodiumAI, is a company specializing in generative AI code.

news.headline: Scripps promotes Matthew Hijuelos to VP of distribution, effective Jan. 1. Will manage distribution across various platforms.
news.summary: In Cincinnati on December 4, 2024, the E.W. Scripps Company announced the promotion of Matthew Hijuelos to the role of vice president of distribution, starting on January 1. In this position, he will lead the team handling distribution across various Scripps platforms, such as cable and satellite. The E.W. Scripps Company, listed on NASDAQ as SSP, continues its strategic appointments to enhance its operations and reach in the media industry.

news.headline: Southeastern Grocers gives customers $50,000+ in free groceries, spreading holiday cheer in Jacksonville.
news.summary: A grocery retailer based in Jacksonville, Florida, Southeastern Grocers has recently launched a promotional campaign offering its customers a chance to win over $50,000 worth of free groceries. Through this initiative, customers can benefit from additional savings and rewards, providing them with extra value for their purchases.

news.headline: Precision Medicine Market to reach USD 66.2 billion by 2028, driven by rising chronic diseases and AI innovations.
news.summary: On December 4, 2024, a report utilizing AI for market analysis revealed significant growth prospects in the global precision medicine sector. It is projected that the market will expand by a substantial USD 66.2 billion between 2024 and 2028, with a projected compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 12.34% during this timeframe.

news.headline: Dow Jones, S&P 500, and Nasdaq climb; small caps weaken. UnitedHealth exec killed. Market tunes in to Powell.
news.summary: On Wednesday, the Dow Jones, S&P 500, and Nasdaq experienced gains, with small caps showing weakness later in the day. Despite the tragic news of a UnitedHealth executive's killing, the Dow Jones continued to climb. Investors closely followed Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell's remarks.

news.headline: a16z predicts 2025 trends with decentralized chatbots and gov’t bonds onchain, highlighting AI and blockchain.
news.summary: In 2025, a16z, a prominent venture capital firm, anticipates that the utilization of artificial intelligence (AI) and blockchain technologies will serve as significant catalysts for growth. These innovative technologies are expected to fuel various use cases, highlighting their potential impact on industry sectors.

news.headline: Jones Walker LLP in New Orleans welcomes 16 new associates including Holland Aucoin, Litigation Buddy Bardenwerper, and Tax Ryan Flood.
news.summary: Jones Walker LLP, a law firm based in New Orleans, has recently added 16 new associates to its team. The new additions include Holland Aucoin in Litigation, Buddy Bardenwerper in Maritime, Hailey Dennis in Maritime, Brandon DeRojas in Tax, Ryan Flood in...

news.headline: 51 workers at three railroads represented by BMWED Teamsters ratified new contracts securing key priorities in Novi, Mich on Dec. 4, 2024.
news.summary: 51 employees belonging to the Brotherhood of Maintenance of Way Employes Division (BMWED) of the Teamsters Rail Conference in NOVI, Michigan, have successfully secured their top priorities. These workers, employed at three different railroads, have voted in favor of new contracts.

news.headline: Nokia Corporation bought back some of its shares on 04.12.2024.
Vow ASA announces trade by insiders & associates in rights issue: 166,666,666 new shares at NOK 1.50 per share nargin Oslo.
news.summary: On December 4, 2024, a rights issue for 166,666,666 new shares in Vow ASA commenced with each share priced at NOK 1.50. This information was shared through stock exchange announcements on November 25, 2024. Among those receiving subscription rights were primary insiders and their close associates.

news.headline: Box beats earnings with $276 million revenue, analyst still bearish with $21 target. Earnings of 45 cents/share exceeds 42 cents estimate.
news.summary: Analyst Rishi Jaluria from RBC Capital Markets reaffirmed an Underperform rating and set a price target of $21 for Box Inc. (NYSE:BOX) following their third-quarter results. Box reported earnings of 45 cents per share, surpassing the analyst consensus of 42 cents, and revenue of $276 million, exceeding the consensus of $275.17 million. For the fourth quarter, Box anticipates revenue of $279 million compared to the estimate of $278.544 million, with adjusted earnings of 41 cents per share, aligning with expectations. More information can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Zeta Global stock surges as company reports 108% increase in platform usage during Thanksgiving-Cyber Monday period, with 100% uptime.
news.summary: Shares of Zeta Global Holdings Corp. (NYSE: ZETA) experienced a rise following the company's report of a remarkable 108% year-on-year surge in usage of its marketing platform between Thanksgiving and Cyber Monday. The platform maintained a flawless 100% uptime as various brands utilized it for tailored, multi-channel marketing strategies aimed at improving business results throughout the festive period. A survey conducted by Zeta revealed that the Thanksgiving weekend witnessed record-breaking sales, with 53% of respondents...

news.headline: Billionaire fintech CEO Jared Isaacman, linked to SpaceX and Elon Musk, chosen by Trump to lead NASA.
news.summary: Jared Isaacman brings a wealth of knowledge in the fintech sector, with a strong background in the industry. He has established connections with notable figures such as Elon Musk and has collaborated with SpaceX.

news.headline: Info-Tech Research Group highlights top WFM solutions: UKG Pro, Dayforce, WorkForce Suite - based on user feedback.
news.summary: According to the latest Workforce Management (WFM) Data Quadrant Report by Info-Tech Research Group, UKG Pro, Dayforce, and WorkForce Suite have been recognized as the top WFM solutions for enhancing workplace efficiency. This ranking is determined through user feedback gathered by the firm, with UKG Pro, Dayforce, and WorkForce Suite standing out as the leading solutions in the market.

news.headline: Allianz Partners USA introduces doctor visit scheduling services for international travelers in 85+ countries.
news.summary: In Richmond, Virginia on December 4, 2024, Allianz Partners USA, a travel insurance and assistance company, announced the release of a new service enabling customers in over 85 countries to swiftly access virtual and in-person medical assistance. This service aims to provide convenient and efficient healthcare support to travelers.

news.headline: Partnership aims to train & support 2,000 talent to cure ALS at AWS re:Invent 2024, using AI to combat the disease.
news.summary: In Las Vegas on December 4, 2024, a collaboration emerged between Compass UOL, an AI services company, and the non-profit organization EverythingALS in a bid to combat Amyotrophic Lateral Sclerosis (ALS). Employing artificial intelligence, the partnership aims to tackle the challenges associated with this debilitating condition. This initiative represents a significant step forward in the ongoing battle against ALS, a disease known for its complexity and resistance to traditional treatments. The utilization of AI technology in this endeavor highlights the potential for innovation in the healthcare sector.

news.headline: AWS and NVIDIA extend NIM microservices to improve AI inference on AWS, enhancing generative AI apps with increased efficiency and reduced latency.
news.summary: AWS and NVIDIA are collaborating to improve AI inference capabilities by rolling out NIM microservices on AWS platforms. This collaboration aims to enhance efficiency and decrease latency for generative AI applications. This expansion is set to significantly benefit users by providing them with faster and more effective AI solutions.

news.headline: DAS Technology's new AI Engage CX Messaging Solution enhances communication with real-time dealer and consumer interaction.
news.summary: In Scottsdale, Arizona, a company has introduced a new AI Engage Messaging Solution that integrates artificial intelligence technology with lead response services and live moderators. This innovative solution aims to enhance the communication between dealers and consumers in real-time. By combining AI messaging with human moderation, the solution offers a comprehensive approach to improving engagement.

news.headline: VyStar Credit Union grows from 12 military personnel with $60 to 1 million members, marking historic milestone.
news.summary: VyStar Credit Union, based in Jacksonville, Florida, recently achieved a significant milestone by surpassing 1 million account holders. This achievement, announced on December 4, 2024, highlights the institution's long history of trust, dedication, and continual expansion since its establishment in 1952.
